header.title: Create new profile
header.subtitle: Welcome to the profile creator. Customize it to your needs

type.heading: Choose profile type
type.caption: Each profile type is tailored to the organization's needs, so choose one that matches your activity.

presentation.heading: How do you want to present yourself?
presentation.caption: The organization name will be visible on the profile page. Add a logo to stand out from other organizations.

description.heading: Describe your activity
description.caption: This will be the description of your profile.

location.heading: Indicate your location
location.caption: You can search for a location using Google Maps or fill in the fields manually.

editHeader.title: Edit profile
editHeader.subtitle: Welcome to the profile creator. Customize it to your needs
